title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Carrier India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Carrier India
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
